texto: She had that kind of undeniable femininity that few women achieve, bogged down as we are by other things.
explicacao: Citação de Kate Pullinger sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “She had that kind of undeniable femininity that few women achieve, bogged down as we are by other…” articula reflexao, women, undeniable em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: She had that kind of undeniable femininity that few women achieve, bogged down as we are by other things.

texto: She's going to keep up her public facade of stoicism and generosity and getting on with thungs. She knows she can do it, she can do the stiff upper lip thing. I will survive. But behind closed doors the going is rough. It's when she is alone that it hits her. And she is often alone, too often, she things no one should have to be alone as much as she is. It should have been me: her mind is a morass of old songs now, Errol Brown started it. It should have been me.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Kate Pullinger sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “She's going to keep up her public facade of stoicism and generosity and getting on with thungs. S…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, alone, sadness, útil em momentos de sadness.

frase_original: She's going to keep up her public facade of stoicism and generosity and getting on with thungs. She knows she can do it, she can do the stiff upper lip thing. I will survive. But behind closed doors the going is rough. It's when she is alone that it hits her. And she is often alone, too often, she things no one should have to be alone as much as she is. It should have been me: her mind is a morass of old songs now, Errol Brown started it. It should have been me.
